meaningful_qa_loop.summary: Local detector, queue, bounded execution packet, demo failure-to-fix cycle, local custom runner, and local skill invocations exist, but the loop is not complete until external replay, current control-room evidence, and final QA signoff all exist.

api_custom_runner_bypass.summary: R13-007 adds a local API-shaped/custom-runner foundation with bounded validation command results only; the bypass gate is not fully delivered.

current_operator_control_room.summary: R13-009 generates current cycle-aware status, Markdown view, refresh result, stale-state checks, validators, tests, and validation manifest from repo truth; this is partial operator-control-room evidence only, not a full hard-gate delivery.

skill_invocation_evidence.summary: R13-008 registers four skills and invokes qa.detect plus qa.fix_plan locally with one passed validation command each; runner.external_replay and control_room.refresh are registered but not invoked as R13-008 skills.

operator_demo.summary: R13-010 remains planned only; no operator demo artifact exists in R13-009.

overall.summary: No R13 hard value gate is fully delivered by R13-009.

lifecycle.summary: R13-002 defines the ideal QA lifecycle contract only.

external_replay_status.summary: No R13 external replay has occurred by R13-009.

control_room_status.summary: R13-009 generates a repo-backed JSON status model, Markdown view, refresh result, and validation manifest; this is not a productized UI and not a fully delivered hard gate.

blockers.title: External replay is missing
blockers.explanation: No R13 external replay evidence exists, so the meaningful QA loop and final signoff remain blocked.
blockers.recommended_next_action: Keep external replay planned until its authorized R13 task is reached.

blockers.title: Final QA signoff is missing
blockers.explanation: No final QA signoff artifact exists in R13-009.
blockers.recommended_next_action: Do not sign off until external replay and current operator evidence are available.

blockers.title: Operator demo is missing
blockers.explanation: R13-010 remains planned only; no operator demo artifact is produced by R13-009.
blockers.recommended_next_action: Use R13-010 as the next legal action.

blockers.title: R13 hard gates are not fully delivered
blockers.explanation: Meaningful QA loop, API/custom-runner bypass, current operator control-room, skill invocation evidence, and operator demo are not fully delivered as hard gates.
blockers.recommended_next_action: Preserve partial statuses and continue through the official R13 task order.

attention_items.title: Current control-room evidence is partial
attention_items.explanation: The JSON status and Markdown view are current and evidence-backed, but they are not productized control-room behavior.
attention_items.recommended_next_action: Review the generated artifacts as repo-generated operator evidence only.

attention_items.title: R13 stops at R13-009
attention_items.explanation: R13-010 through R13-018 remain planned only.
attention_items.recommended_next_action: Do not implement R13-010 or later inside R13-009.

attention_items.title: Skill invocation evidence remains partial
attention_items.explanation: Only qa.detect and qa.fix_plan were invoked by R13-008.
attention_items.recommended_next_action: Keep runner.external_replay and control_room.refresh non-invoked unless a later R13 task authorizes them.

attention_items.title: No R14 or successor is open
attention_items.explanation: R13 remains active and no successor milestone is authorized.
attention_items.recommended_next_action: Refuse any R14 or successor claim until separate operator approval and repo-truth opening evidence exist.

next_actions.title: Add operator demo artifact
next_actions.description: Generate the operator demo artifact from actual QA failure-to-fix cycle evidence and current pipeline refs.
next_actions.required_before: R13-011 external replay or later signoff

next_actions.title: Planned external replay after QA fix loop
next_actions.description: External replay remains planned after the operator demo boundary unless the authority is changed by explicit repo-truth approval.

operator_decisions_required.title: Review R13-009 generated control-room status and Markdown view
Authorize R13-010 only as the next implementation slice
